Video.summary: Dr. Barnhart takes you on a whirlwind tour of important places, civilizations, and events in Mesoamerica.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: The Maya, Aztecs, and Mesoamerica

Video.summary: Here, hear how the Olmec were discovered, and investigate three intriguing sites where they lived.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Olmec Civilization Emerges

Video.summary: Delve into Olmec art, searching for clues to who the Olmec were and what preoccupied these builders.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Olmec Art as the Mother Culture

Image.alt: Olmec Art as the Mother Culture
Olmec Art as the Mother Culture
Olmec Art as the Mother Culture

Video.summary: Investigate other cultures that thrived in Mesoamerica at the time of the Olmec.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Olmec Contemporaries

Video.summary: Learn about the botany of Mesoamerica and how it eventually benefited the entire world.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Mesoamerican Plants, Cuisine, and Medicine

Video.summary: Here, trace the origin of Maya civilization to a dramatic change in the nature of public monuments.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Early Highland Maya - Izapa to Kaminaljuyu

Image.alt: Early Highland Maya - Izapa to Kaminaljuyu
Early Highland Maya - Izapa to Kaminaljuyu
Early Highland Maya - Izapa to Kaminaljuyu

Video.summary: Travel to the Petén rainforest in northern Guatemala, where hundreds of Maya settlements lie hidden.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Preclassic Maya Lowlands - El Mirador

Video.summary: Here, hear the magical story of the ancient Maya story of creation, the Popol Vuh, in captivating detail.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: The Popol Vuh - Creation and Hero Twins

Image.alt: The Popol Vuh - Creation and Hero Twins
The Popol Vuh - Creation and Hero Twins
The Popol Vuh - Creation and Hero Twins

Video.summary: Start your adventures in the Maya world with a trip to Mérida.
Video.title: Mérida

Video.summary: Travel to Izamal, the "yellow city," then venture to Chichén Itzá.
Video.title: Chichén Itzá

Video.summary: Join Dr. Barnhart for a trip to two of his favorite places in the Yucatán.
Video.title: Ek' Balam

Video.summary: Talk to howler monkeys, plunge into a geological cathedral, and more.
Video.title: Tihosuco

Video.summary: Grasp the diversity of early South American cultures.
Video.title: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Image.alt: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Video.summary: Explore the means of subsistence for Peru's coastal and inland valley cities.
Video.title: Discovering Peru's Earliest Cities

Video.summary: Here, investigate the important Monte Verde site and its view into everyday life 15,000 years ago.
Video.title: South America's First People

Video.summary: Observe pivotal changes in northern Peruvian societies in 1800-900 B.C.
Video.title: Ceramics, Textiles, and Organized States

Video.summary: Learn about later religious iconography and artifacts at Chavin.
Video.title: Chavín and the Rise of Religious Authority

Image.alt: Chavín and the Rise of Religious Authority
Chavín and the Rise of Religious Authority
Chavín and the Rise of Religious Authority

Video.summary: Encounter the Salinar culture, a new settlement pattern showing no ceremonial architecture.
Video.title: Cupisnique to Salinar - Elite Rulers and War

Image.alt: Cupisnique to Salinar - Elite Rulers and War
Cupisnique to Salinar - Elite Rulers and War
Cupisnique to Salinar - Elite Rulers and War

Video.summary: Investigate the Paracas tombs of the 1st millennium B.C. and grasp the significance of mummification.
Video.title: Paracas - Mummies, Shamans, and Severed Heads

Image.alt: Paracas - Mummies, Shamans, and Severed Heads
Paracas - Mummies, Shamans, and Severed Heads
Paracas - Mummies, Shamans, and Severed Heads

Video.summary: Learn about the Nazca's remarkable irrigation system and penetrate the mystery of the "Nazca Lines".
Video.title: The Nazca Lines and Underground Channels

Image.alt: The Nazca Lines and Underground Channels
The Nazca Lines and Underground Channels
The Nazca Lines and Underground Channels

Video.summary: Gen. Clark begins the series by plunging you into combat with a 25-year-old Army captain in Vietnam in 1970.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: America: Forged in War

Video.summary: Analyze Washington's brilliant defense of Boston and his disastrous defeat trying to hold New York City.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: George Washington Takes Command

Video.summary: Follow the next four years of the revolution, which ended with the British surrender at Yorktown in 1781.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army

Image.alt: Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army
Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army
Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army

Video.summary: One military genius who emerged from the War of 1812: Andrew Jackson, the hero of the Battle of New Orleans.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812

Image.alt: Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812
Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812
Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812

Video.summary: This episode explains the sectional controversies and clashes that set the stage for secession and war.
Video.title: Prelude to War

Video.summary: The presidential canvas of 1860 resulted in Lincoln's election as the first Republican to win the White House.
Video.title: The Election of 1860

Video.summary: Study the process that established the Confederate States of America.
Video.title: The Lower South Secedes

Video.summary: Learn how the US-held Fort Sumter in Charleston Harbor became a flash point to begin war.
Video.title: The Crisis at Fort Sumter

Video.summary: We are finally able to reveal the fascinating truths about ancient North America.
Video.title: The Unknown Story of Ancient North America

Image.alt: The Unknown Story of Ancient North America
The Unknown Story of Ancient North America
The Unknown Story of Ancient North America

Video.summary: DNA evidence points to Asia as the origin of all human migration to North America.
Video.title: The First Human Migrations to the Americas

Image.alt: The First Human Migrations to the Americas
The First Human Migrations to the Americas
The First Human Migrations to the Americas

Video.summary: Explore Clovis, the very first American culture.
Video.title: Clovis Man: America's First Culture

Video.summary: Better understand why some Paleo-Indian groups developed hunting and gathering culture.
Video.title: The Archaic Period: Diversity Begins
